mapper.select: SELECT C.DESCRIPTION , SUM(D.ANSWER_SCORE) / 4 AS SCORE FROM ( SELECT RESPONSE_ID , SURVEY_ID , USER_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY USER_ID, SURVEY_ID ORDER BY REG_DT DESC -- 최신 응답 기준 ) AS RN FROM TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} -- 서브쿼리 안에서 먼저 필터 ) A JOIN TBL_SURVEY B ON A.SURVEY_ID = B.SURVEY_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_QUESTION C ON B.SURVEY_ID = C.SURVEY_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_ANSWER D ON A.RESPONSE_ID = D.RESPONSE_ID AND C.QUESTION_ID = D.QUESTION_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_OPTION E ON D.SELECTED_OPTION_ID = E.OPTION_ID WHERE A.RN = 1 AND B.SURVEY_TYPE_CODE = 'RISK_PROFILE' GROUP BY C.DESCRIPTION

WITH LATEST_RESPONSES AS ( /* 각 유저의 MARKET_RISK_SURVEY 최신 응답 1건 */ SELECT R.RESPONSE_ID , R.USER_ID , R.SURVEY_ID FROM TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE R JOIN TBL_SURVEY S ON S.SURVEY_ID = R.SURVEY_ID AND S.SURVEY_TYPE_CODE = 'MARKET_RISK_SURVEY' AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE R.RESPONSE_ID = ( SELECT RESPONSE_ID FROM TBL_USER_SURVEY_RESPONSE WHERE USER_ID = R.USER_ID AND SURVEY_ID = R.SURVEY_ID ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ) ), OPTION_COUNTS AS ( /* 질문별 선택지별 응답 수 및 전체 비율 */ SELECT A.QUESTION_ID , A.SELECTED_OPTION_ID , COUNT(*) AS CNT , ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(PARTITION BY A.QUESTION_ID), 0) AS OPTION_PCT FROM LATEST_RESPONSES LR JOIN TBL_SURVEY_ANSWER A ON A.RESPONSE_ID = LR.RESPONSE_ID GROUP BY A.QUESTION_ID, A.SELECTED_OPTION_ID ), MAJORITY_OPTION AS ( /* 질문별 가장 많이 선택된 선택지 (동점 시 OPTION_ID 낮은 것 우선) */ SELECT QUESTION_ID , OPTION_ID , OPTION_TEXT FROM ( SELECT OC.QUESTION_ID , OC.SELECTED_OPTION_ID AS OPTION_ID , SO.OPTION_TEXT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OC.QUESTION_ID ORDER BY OC.CNT DESC, OC.SELECTED_OPTION_ID ASC) AS RN FROM OPTION_COUNTS OC JOIN TBL_SURVEY_OPTION SO ON SO.OPTION_ID = OC.SELECTED_OPTION_ID ) T WHERE T.RN = 1 ) SELECT Q.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , Q.QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText , MY_OPT.OPTION_TEXT AS myOptionText , MJ.OPTION_TEXT AS majorityOptionText , CASE WHEN MY_A.SELECTED_OPTION_ID = MJ.OPTION_ID THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS matchYn , OC.OPTION_PCT AS myChoicePct FROM TBL_SURVEY S JOIN TBL_SURVEY_QUESTION Q ON Q.SURVEY_ID = S.SURVEY_ID JOIN LATEST_RESPONSES MY_LR ON MY_LR.SURVEY_ID = S.SURVEY_ID AND MY_LR.USER_ID = #{userId} JOIN TBL_SURVEY_ANSWER MY_A ON MY_A.RESPONSE_ID = MY_LR.RESPONSE_ID AND MY_A.QUESTION_ID = Q.QUESTION_ID JOIN TBL_SURVEY_OPTION MY_OPT ON MY_OPT.OPTION_ID = MY_A.SELECTED_OPTION_ID JOIN MAJORITY_OPTION MJ ON MJ.QUESTION_ID = Q.QUESTION_ID JOIN OPTION_COUNTS OC ON OC.QUESTION_ID = Q.QUESTION_ID AND OC.SELECTED_OPTION_ID = MY_A.SELECTED_OPTION_ID WHERE S.SURVEY_TYPE_CODE = 'MARKET_RISK_SURVEY' AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY Q.SORT_ORDER

SELECT B.SECTOR , B.SECTOR_KO , ROUND(SUM(A.BUY_AMOUNT) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(A.BUY_AMOUNT)) OVER(), 2) AS sectorPct FROM TBL_PORTFOLIO_ITEM A JOIN TBL_PORTFOLIO P ON A.PORTFOLIO_ID = P.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN TBL_COMPANIES B ON A.STOCK_CD = B.TICKER WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY B.SECTOR_KO, B.SECTOR
